title: throttled heartbeat+lease renewal in hooks; state RMW under lock (D5+D6)
action: FREEZE FIRST: test_hook_contracts + test_state_write_concurrency green recorded. Per D5 (Δ3/Δ4-amended): claims.mjs gains heartbeatTouch(root,sessionId) — no-op unless stored heartbeat older than 60s; else refresh heartbeat AND renew leases via NEW same-session-only primitives: renewClaimTTL(root,sessionId) in claims.mjs (per claim: acquireGate skip-if-held per claims.mjs:214-230 — a renewal racing adoptClaim must never revert ownership; rewrite claim file only when its session matches) and renewHoldsBySession(root,sessionId) in reservations.mjs. EVERY store write inside touch goes through withStoreLock in try-once/skip-on-busy mode (LOCK_BUSY -> skip silently; hooks never WAIT on the lock). Wire touch into hooks/bee-prompt-context.mjs + hooks/bee-state-sync.mjs inside their existing fail-open try/catch (session id derived from ctx.payload.session_id, pattern bee-session-init.mjs:49-51; catalog does NOT hash handler bytes — no projection re-render, but hooks/ <-> .bee/bin/hooks/ mirror is enforced by test_lib_mirror). ALSO Δ3: bee-state-sync own state RMW (bee-state-sync.mjs:42-45) goes under the same try-once lock. Per D6 (plan-check C3): the state logical-RMW verbs live in bee.mjs — set/gate/worker add|remove/scribing-run via resolveMutationTarget (bee.mjs:979), stateWorkerMutate (:1151), handleStateGate (:1153-1157) — plus startFeature (state.mjs:1620); wrap each read-mutate-write in withStoreLock(root,state,fn) (CLI verbs WAIT normally). scripts/test_heartbeat_touch.mjs: throttle no-op byte-identical; over-60s refresh + both renewals; touch-throw leaves hook exit green; LOCK_BUSY skip case; renewal-vs-adopt gate case. Documented non-goal (Δ6): idle-session blanket renewal accepted — force door + terminal release are the rescue. Existing suites byte-unchanged and green. Manifest --write + --check.

truths: hooks remain fail-open (a touch throw never blocks)
at most one heartbeat write per 60s per session
state verbs serialized under the lock

verify: node scripts/test_heartbeat_touch.mjs && node hooks/test_hook_contracts.mjs && node scripts/test_state_write_concurrency.mjs && node scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check

trace.outcome: Verified predecessor's D5/D6 implementation (0871734) against every action guardrail — all present, nothing missing. Completed the cell: wrote scripts/test_heartbeat_touch.mjs (23-row suite covering throttle no-op, hook-driven refresh composition, touch-throw fail-open, LOCK_BUSY silent skip at both session-heartbeat and state-RMW layers, and renewal-vs-.adopting-gate skip/never-rewrite), ran a deliberate-red proof (disabled the gate check, watched exactly the 2 gate rows fail, restored byte-identical), regenerated the release manifest, and ran the full cell verify chain green.
deviations: Predecessor session died mid-cell (session limit) and hand-committed its implementation as 0871734 "multi session hardenining" — no cell id, outside the normal one-commit-per-cell convention (critical rule 8). This session verified the predecessor's implementation against the action's full guardrail list (try-once/skip-on-busy hooks, same-session-only renewal respecting the .adopting gate, fail-open hooks, CLI verbs waiting normally under the D6 lock), found nothing missing, and completed the cell's remaining requirements (scripts/test_heartbeat_touch.mjs, the deliberate-red proof, manifest regen, report) rather than re-implementing existing correct work. See docs/history/multi-session-hardening/reports/msh-5.md for full detail.

0871734 also carried two side artifacts outside a normal cell diff — .bee/cells/msh-5.json and .bee/cells/msh-6.json (the predecessor's own cell record and a follow-on cell it had begun scoping). Both left untouched; msh-6 is out of this cell's scope.

IMPLEMENTATION GUARDRAIL AUDIT (this session, against the action's requirements, all
found already present in the predecessor's commit 0871734 — nothing missing):
- hooks/bee-prompt-context.mjs, hooks/bee-state-sync.mjs: heartbeatTouch call wrapped
  in its OWN try/catch separate from the primary job; session id derived from
  ctx.payload.session_id (never handed down); reservations.mjs renewHoldsBySession
  called alongside with { maxAttempts: 1 } when touch.touched is true.
- bee-state-sync.mjs: its own state RMW wrapped in withStoreLock(root, 'state', ...,
  { maxAttempts: 1 }); LOCK_BUSY caught and swallowed (not re-thrown, not logged as
  crash); any other error re-thrown to the outer fail-open catch.
- claims.mjs: HEARTBEAT_TOUCH_THROTTLE_SECONDS = 60 (900s stale threshold untouched);
  heartbeatTouch no-ops unless stored heartbeat older than the throttle; session
  heartbeat write is try-once (maxAttempts: 1) via withStoreLock('sessions', ...);
  renewClaimTTL is same-session-only, gated by the existing acquireGate/releaseGate
  per-claim exclusive gate (skip-if-held, never adoptClaim, ownership re-verified
  under the gate).
- reservations.mjs: renewHoldsBySession is same-session-only, never revives a
  released row, runs under withStoreLock('reservations', ...) with lockOptions passed
  through from the hook caller.
- lock.mjs: withStoreLock gained options.maxAttempts/retryDelayMs (default unchanged,
  ~100 attempts/~5s); a caller passing maxAttempts:1 gets exactly one try, no sleep,
  LOCK_BUSY thrown immediately on failure — never a fall-through unlocked write.
- state.mjs: startFeature is now async and wraps its entire read-check-write body in
  withStoreLock(root, 'state', ...) with no maxAttempts override (CLI verbs wait
  normally).
- bee.mjs: handleStateSet, handleStateGate, stateWorkerMutate (shared by worker
  add/update/remove/clear), handleStateScribingRun are now async and wrap their
  read-check-write bodies in withStoreLock(root, 'state', ...); handleStateStartFeature
  awaits startFeature; the CLI dispatch table generically awaits every handler
  (confirmed: `const response = await handler(root, parsed.flags);`).
- Mirror check: skills/bee-hive/templates/{lib/claims.mjs,lib/reservations.mjs,
  lib/state.mjs,lib/lock.mjs,bee.mjs} are byte-identical to their .bee/bin
  counterparts; hooks/bee-prompt-context.mjs and hooks/bee-state-sync.mjs are
  byte-identical to their .bee/bin/hooks counterparts (all confirmed via `diff`,
  zero output, and via test_lib_mirror.mjs's own pass).
